prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: 4SN-4PCSTICKERS-SPIDER-66608-HPN
Product Type: STICKER_DECAL
Brand (from catalog): Marvel
Existing Title: Marvel Spidey and His Amazing Friends Stickers - 60 Spiderman Stickers Featuring Peter Parker, Miles Morales, and Gwen Stacy (Spiderman Party Supplies)
Description: Marvel Spidey and His Amazing Friends Stickers - 60 Spiderman Stickers Featuring Peter Parker, Miles Morales, and Gwen Stacy (Spiderman Party Supplies). This Spiderman sticker set includes 4 sheets with 60 total stickers featuring colorful artwork of favorite Spiderman characters including Peter Parker, Miles Morales, and Gwen Stacy. Sure to be a hit with Spiderman fans of all ages, these sticker sheets are great to use as party favors, party supplies, goodie bag fillers, gift basket fillers, and more. These Spidey and his Amazing Friends stickers are perfect to add the finishing touch to any projects including scrapbooks, journals, and any other arts and crafts. Officially licensed Spidey and his Amazing Friends stickers are sure to be a hit with superhero fans of all ages, boys and girls alike also comes with a superhero door hanger.
Search Terms: (none)
Features:
- This Spiderman sticker set includes 4 sheets with 60 total stickers featuring colorful artwork of favorite Spiderman characters including Peter Parker, Miles Morales, and Gwen Stacy.
- Sure to be a hit with Spiderman fans of all ages, these sticker sheets are great to use as party favors, party supplies, goodie bag fillers, gift basket fillers, and more.
- These Spidey and his Amazing Friends stickers are perfect to add the finishing touch to any projects including scrapbooks, journals, and any other arts and crafts.
- Officially licensed Spidey and his Amazing Friends stickers are sure to be a hit with superhero fans of all ages, boys and girls alike also comes with a superhero door hanger.

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Marvel Spidey and His Amazing Friends 60-Sticker Pack

tokens.name: Spidey and His Amazing Friends Stickers

openai.item_name: Marvel 4-Sheet Spidey and His Amazing Friends Stickers

tokens.name: Spidey and His Amazing Friends Stickers

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Sheets, 60 Total Stickers, Peter Parker, Miles Morales, Gwen Stacy, Party Favors, Door Hanger Included

openai.title_differentiation: 60 Stickers, 4 Sheets, Peter Parker Miles Morales And Gwen Stacy, Officially Licensed, Party Favors
